content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by integrating HyDE (Hypothetical Document Embeddings) logic from RAG to pre-process hypothetical action trajectories into retrievable episodic memory embeddings, filtering low-value candidate memories via intrinsic curiosity signals. This creates a self-improving memory retrieval loop where agents only query for new environmental data when stored hypothetical trajectories mismatch real-world observations.
